verses.geez: ወእምዝ ፡ ጸንዐ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔር ።

translations.lxx: But the famine prevailed in the land.
translations.kjv: And the famine was sore in the land.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ አኅለቁ ፡ ተሴስዮ ፡ እክለ ፡ ዘአምጽኡ ፡ እምብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ አቡሆሙ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ካዕበ ፡ አምጽኡ
                  ፡ ለነ ፡ እክለ ፡ ተሣይጠክሙ ፡ ኅዳጠ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass, when they had finished eating the corn which they had brought out of Egypt, that their father said to them, Go again; buy us a little food.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when they had eaten up the corn which they had brought out of Egypt, their father said unto them, Go again, buy us a little food.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ በሰማዕት ፡ አስምዐ ፡ ለነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ባዕለ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ወይቤለነ ፡ ኢትሬእዩ ፡ እንከ ፡
                  ገጽየ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢመጽአ ፡ እኁክሙ ፡ ዘይንእስ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Judas spoke to him, saying, The man, the lord of the country, positively testified to us, saying, Ye shall not see my face, unless your younger brother be with you.
translations.kjv: And Judah spake unto him, saying, The man did solemnly protest unto us, saying, Ye shall not see my face, except your brother be with you.

verses.geez: ወለእመሰ ፡ ትፌንዎ ፡ ለእኁነ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ነሐውር ፡ ወንሣየጥ ፡ ለከ ፡ እክለ ።

translations.lxx: If, then, thou send our brother with us, we will go down, and buy thee food;
translations.kjv: If thou wilt send our brother with us, we will go down and buy thee food:

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰ ፡ ኢትፌንዎ ፡ ለእኁነ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ኢነሐውር ፡ እስመ ፡ ይቤለነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ገጽየ ፡ ኢትሬእዩ ፡
                  እንከ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢያምጻእክምዎ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ ለእኁክሙ ፡ ዘይንእስ ።

translations.lxx: but if thou send not our brother with us, we will not go: for the man spoke to us, saying, Ye shall not see my face, unless your younger brother be with you.
translations.kjv: But if thou wilt not send him, we will not go down: for the man said unto us, Ye shall not see my face, except your brother be with you.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ምንትኑ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ እኪት ፡ ዘገበርክሙ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡ ዘነገርክምዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ብክሙ ፡ እኈ ።

translations.lxx: And Israel said, Why did ye harm me, inasmuch as ye told the man that ye had a brother?
translations.kjv: And Israel said, Wherefore dealt ye so ill with me, as to tell the man whether ye had yet a brother?

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ እስመ ፡ ተስእለነ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ፍጥረተነ ፡ ወይቤለነ ፡ ሀለወኑ ፡ አቡክሙ ፡ (አረጋዊ ፡) ሕያውኑ ፡ ወቦኑ ፡
                  ዘብክሙ ፡ እኈ ፡ ወነገርናሁ ፡ ዘከመ ፡ ተስእለነ ፡ ቦኑ ፡ አእመርነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይብለነ ፡ አምጽእዎ ፡ ለእኁክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And they said, The man closely questioned us about our family also, saying, Does your father yet live, and have ye a brother? and we answered him according to this question: did we know that he would say to us, Bring your brother?
translations.kjv: And they said, The man asked us straitly of our state, and of our kindred, saying, Is your father yet alive? have ye another brother? and we told him according to the tenor of these words: could we certainly know that he would say, Bring your brother down?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ለአቡሁ ፡ ፈንዎ ፡ ለዝ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ ወንትነሣእ ፡ ንሑር ፡ ከመ ፡ ንሕየው ፡ ወኢንሙት ፡
                  ንሕነሂ ፡ ወጥሪትነሂ ።

translations.lxx: And Judas said to his father Israel, Send the boy with me, and we will arise and go, that we may live and not die, both we and thou, and our store.
translations.kjv: And Judah said unto Israel his father, Send the lad with me, and we will arise and go; that we may live, and not die, both we, and thou, and also our little ones.

verses.geez:
ወአነ ፡ እትሐበዮ ፡ ወኪያየ ፡ ኅሥሥ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢያግባእክዎ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ ወለእመ ፡ ኢያቀምክዎ ፡ ቅድሜከ ፡ ጊጉየ ፡
                  ኮንኩ ፡ ላዕሌከ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ መዋዕልየ ።

translations.lxx: And I engage for him; at my hand do thou require him; if I bring him not to thee, and place him before thee, I shall be guilty toward thee for ever.
translations.kjv: I will be surety for him; of my hand shalt thou require him: if I bring him not unto thee, and set him before thee, then let me bear the blame for ever:

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ አኮ ፡ ዘጐንደይነ ፡ ካዕበሰ ፡ እምደገምነ ፡ ገቢአ ።

translations.lxx: For if we had not tarried, we should now have returned twice.
translations.kjv: For except we had lingered, surely now we had returned this second time.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ አቡሆሙ ፡ ለእመሰ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ፡ ንሥኡ ፡ እምፍሬ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወደዩ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ አኅስሊክሙ ፡ ወስዱ ፡ ለብእሲ ፡ አምኃ ፡ ልጥረ ፡ ወመዓረ ፡ ወዕጣነ ፡ ወማየ ፡ ልብን ፡ ወ[ጠርቤን]ቶስ ፡
                  ወከርካዕ ።

translations.lxx: And Israel, their father, said to them, If it be so, do this; take of the fruits of the earth in your vessels, and carry down to the man presents of gum and honey, and frankincense, and stacte, and turpentine, and walnuts.
translations.kjv: And their father Israel said unto them, If it must be so now, do this; take of the best fruits in the land in your vessels, and carry down the man a present, a little balm, and a little honey, spices, and myrrh, nuts, and almonds:

verses.geez:
ወወርቅክሙሰ ፡ ካዕበቶ ፡ ንሥኡ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ ዝንቱሂ ፡ ዘረከብክሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ አኅስሊክሙ ፡ ወነሣእክምዎ ፡ በኢያእምሮ
                  ፡ ኮነ ፡ ዮጊ ።

translations.lxx: And take double money in your hands, and the money that was returned in your sacks, carry back with you, lest peradventure it is a mistake.
translations.kjv: And take double money in your hand; and the money that was brought again in the mouth of your sacks, carry it again in your hand; peradventure it was an oversight:

verses.geez: ወንሥእዎ ፡ ለእኁክሙሂ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ ወተንሥኡ ፡ ረዱ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ብእሲ ።

translations.lxx: And take your brother; and arise, go down to the man.
translations.kjv: Take also your brother, and arise, go again unto the man:

verses.geez:
ወአምላኪየ ፡ ይሁበክሙ ፡ ሞገሰ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወያገብእ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ እኁክሙ ፡ ወለብንያምኒ ፡
                  ወአንሰ ፡ ዳእሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ኀጣእኩ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ ኀጣእኩ ።

translations.lxx: And my God give you favour in the sight of the man, and send away your other brother, and Benjamin, for I accordingly as I have been bereaved, am bereaved.
translations.kjv: And God Almighty give you mercy before the man, that he may send away your other brother, and Benjamin. If I be bereaved of my children, I am bereaved.

verses.geez:
ወነሥኡ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ውእተ ፡ አምኃሁ ፡ ወወርቆሙኒ ፡ ካዕበተ ፡ ነሥኡ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ወብንያምሃኒ ፡ ወተንሥኡ
                  ፡ ወወረዱ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወበጽሑ ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ።

translations.lxx: And the men having taken these presents, and the double money, took in their hands also Benjamin; and they rose up and went down to Egypt, and stood before Joseph.
translations.kjv: And the men took that present, and they took double money in their hand, and Benjamin; and rose up, and went down to Egypt, and stood before Joseph.

verses.geez:
[ወርእዮ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ለብንያም ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡] ወይቤሎ ፡ ለመጋቤ ፡ ቤቱ ፡ አብኦሙ ፡ ለእሉ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤት ፡
                  ወጥባኅ ፡ ወአስተዳሉ ፡ እስመ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ ይመስሑ ፡ እሉ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ወምስሌየ ፡ ይበልዑ ፡ እክለ ፡ መዓልተ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph saw them and his brother Benjamin, born of the same mother; and he said to the steward of his household, Bring the men into the house, and slay beasts and make ready, for the men are to eat bread with me at noon.
translations.kjv: And when Joseph saw Benjamin with them, he said to the ruler of his house, Bring these men home, and slay, and make ready; for these men shall dine with me at noon.

verses.geez: ወገብረ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤሎ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ወአብኦሙ ፡ ለእሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ቤተ ፡ ዮሴፍ ።

translations.lxx: And the man did as Joseph said; and he brought the men into the house of Joseph.
translations.kjv: And the man did as Joseph bade; and the man brought the men into Joseph’s house.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእዩ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ከመ ፡ አብእዎሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ይቤሉ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ዝክቱ ፡ ወርቅ ፡
                  ዘገብአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አኅስሊነ ፡ ዘቀዲሙ ፡ ይወስዱነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይኰንኑነ ፡ ወይቅንዩነ ፡ ወይ[ን]ሥኡ ፡ እንስሳነ ።

translations.lxx: And the men, when they perceived that they were brought into the house of Joseph, said, We are brought in because of the money that was returned in our sacks at the first; even in order to inform against us, and lay it to our charge; to take us for servants, and our asses.
translations.kjv: And the men were afraid, because they were brought into Joseph’s house; and they said, Because of the money that was returned in our sacks at the first time are we brought in; that he may seek occasion against us, and fall upon us, and take us for bondmen, and our asses.

verses.geez: ወመጽኡ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ [ዘላዕለ ፡] ቤተ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ወነገርዎ ፡ በኆኅተ ፡ ቤት ።

translations.lxx: And having approached the man who was over the house of Joseph, they spoke to him in the porch of the house,
translations.kjv: And they came near to the steward of Joseph’s house, and they communed with him at the door of the house,

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ ናስተበቍዐከ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ወረድነ ፡ ቀዲሙ ፡ ንሣየጥ ፡ እክለ ።

translations.lxx: saying, We pray thee, Sir; we came down at first to buy food.
translations.kjv: And said, O sir, we came indeed down at the first time to buy food:

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ሶበ ፡ በጻሕነ ፡ ለኅዲር ፡ ወፈታሕነ ፡ አኅስሊነ ፡ ረከብነ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አኅስሊነ ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዚአነ ፡
                  ወይእዜኒ ፡ ወርቅነሰ ፡ አግባእነ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ በበ ፡ መድሎቱ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass, when we came to unlade, and opened our sacks, there was also this money of each in his sack; we have now brought back our money by weight in our hands.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when we came to the inn, that we opened our sacks, and, behold, every man’s money was in the mouth of his sack, our money in full weight: and we have brought it again in our hand.

verses.geez:
ወካልአኒ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ አምጻእነ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ በዘ ፡ ንሣየጥ ፡ እክለ ፡ ወኢያእመርነ ፡ መኑ ፡ ወደዮ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ወርቅ
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ አኅስሊነ ።

translations.lxx: And we have brought other money with us to buy food; we know not who put the money into our sacks.
translations.kjv: And other money have we brought down in our hands to buy food: we cannot tell who put our money in our sacks.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ሐሰ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ኢት[ፍ]ርሁ ፤ አምላክክሙ ፡ ወአምላከ ፡ አበዊክሙ ፡ አጥዐመክሙ ፡
                  መደፍንተ ፡ በውስተ ፡ አኅስሊክሙ ፡ ወወርቅክሙሰ ፡ ሠሚርየ ፡ ነሣእኩ ፡ ወአውፅኦ ፡ ለስምዖንሂ ፡ ኀቤሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to them, God deal mercifully with you; be not afraid; your God, and the God of your fathers, has given you treasures in your sacks, and I have enough of your good money. And he brought Symeon out to them.
translations.kjv: And he said, Peace be to you, fear not: your God, and the God of your father, hath given you treasure in your sacks: I had your money. And he brought Simeon out unto them.

verses.geez: ወአምጽአ ፡ ማየ ፡ ለእገሪሆሙ ፡ ወወሀበ ፡ እክለ ፡ ለአእዱጊሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And he brought water to wash their feet; and gave provender to their asses.
translations.kjv: And the man brought the men into Joseph’s house, and gave them water, and they washed their feet; and he gave their asses provender.

verses.geez: ወአስተዳለዉ ፡ አምኃሆሙ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይበውእ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ መዓልተ ፡ እስመ ፡ ሰምዑ ፡ ከመ ፡ በህየ ፡ ይመስሕ ።

translations.lxx: And they prepared their gifts, until Joseph came at noon, for they heard that he was going to dine there.
translations.kjv: And they made ready the present against Joseph came at noon: for they heard that they should eat bread there.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ መጽአ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤቱ ፡ አምጽኡ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ አምኃሁ ፡ እምዘ ፡ ቦሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤቶሙ ፡ ወሰገዱ ፡
                  ሎቱ ፡ በገጾሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph entered into the house, and they brought him the gifts which they had in their hands, into the house; and they did him reverence with their face to the ground.
translations.kjv: And when Joseph came home, they brought him the present which was in their hand into the house, and bowed themselves to him to the earth.

verses.geez: ወተስእሎሙ ፡ ዜናሆሙ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ዳኅንኑ ፡ አቡክሙ ፡ ዝኩ ፡ አረጋዊ ፡ ዘትቤሉኒ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ሕያው ።

translations.lxx: And he asked them, How are ye? and he said to them, Is your father, the old man of whom ye spoke, well? Does he yet live?
translations.kjv: And he asked them of their welfare, and said, Is your father well, the old man of whom ye spake? Is he yet alive?

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ዳኅን ፡ ገብርከ ፡ አረጋዊ ፡ አቡነ ፡ ወዓዲሁ ፡ ሕያው ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ቡሩክ ፡ ውእቱ ፡
                  ብእሲ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወአትሐቱ ፡ ርእሶሙ ፡ ወሰገዱ ፡ ሎቱ ።

translations.lxx: And they said, Thy servant our father is well; he is yet alive. And he said, Blessed be that man by God;—and they bowed, and did him reverence.
translations.kjv: And they answered, Thy servant our father is in good health, he is yet alive. And they bowed down their heads, and made obeisance.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ነጸረ ፡ ወርእዮ ፡ ለብንያም ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ወልደ ፡ እሙ ፡ ይቤሎሙ ፡ ዝኑ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እኁክሙ ፡ ዘይንእስ ፡
                  ዘትቤሉ ፡ ናመጽኦ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ እወ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይሣሀልከ ፡ ወልድየ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph lifted up his eyes, and saw his brother Benjamin, born of the same mother; and he said, Is this your younger brother, whom ye spoke of bringing to me? and he said, God have mercy on thee, my son.
translations.kjv: And he lifted up his eyes, and saw his brother Benjamin, his mother’s son, and said, Is this your younger brother, of whom ye spake unto me? And he said, God be gracious unto thee, my son.

verses.geez: ወተሀውከ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ አማዕዋቲሁ ፡ ወፈቀደ ፡ ይብኪ ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ወሳጢተ ፡ ወበከየ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph was troubled, for his bowels yearned over his brother, and he sought to weep; and he went into his chamber, and wept there.
translations.kjv: And Joseph made haste; for his bowels did yearn upon his brother: and he sought where to weep; and he entered into his chamber, and wept there.

verses.geez: ወተኀፅበ ፡ ገጾ ፡ ወወፅአ ፡ ተዐጊሶ ፡ ወይቤ ፡ አቅርቡ ፡ ለነ ፡ ኅብስተ ።

translations.lxx: And he washed his face and came out, and refrained himself, and said, Set on bread.
translations.kjv: And he washed his face, and went out, and refrained himself, and said, Set on bread.

verses.geez:
ወአቅረቡ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ ባሕቲቶሙ ፡ ወሎቱኒ ፡ እንተ ፡ ባሕቲቱ ፡ ወለሰብአ ፡ ግብጽኒ ፡ እለ ፡ ይመስሑ ፡ እንተ ፡
                  ባሕቲቶሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢይክሉ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ በሊዐ ፡ እክል ፡ ምስለ ፡ ዕብራዊያን ፡ እስመ ፡ ያስቆርርዎሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡
                  ግብጽ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ኖሎት ፡ ለኵሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And they set on bread for him alone, and for them by themselves, and for the Egyptians feasting with him by themselves, for the Egyptians could not eat bread with the Hebrews, for it is an abomination to the Egyptians.
translations.kjv: And they set on for him by himself, and for them by themselves, and for the Egyptians, which did eat with him, by themselves: because the Egyptians might not eat bread with the Hebrews; for that is an abomination unto the Egyptians.

verses.geez: ወነበረ ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡ በኵሮሙ ፡ ዘይልህቅ ፡ ወዘይንእስኒ ፡ በነአሳቲሁ ፡ ወአንከሩ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ካልኡ ።

translations.lxx: And they sat before him, the first-born according to his seniority, and the younger according to his youth; and the men looked with amazement every one at his brother.
translations.kjv: And they sat before him, the firstborn according to his birthright, and the youngest according to his youth: and the men marvelled one at another.

verses.geez:
ወነሥኡ ፡ ክፍሎሙ ፡ በኀቤሁ ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዚአሆሙ ፡ ወዐብየ ፡ ክፍሉ ፡ ለብንያም ፡ እምነ ፡ ዘኵሎሙ ፡ ምኀምስተ ፡
                  ዘእልክቱ ፡ ወሰትዩ ፡ ወሰክሩ ፡ ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And they took their portions from him to themselves; but Benjamin's portion was five times as much as the portions of the others. And they drank and were filled with drink with him.
translations.kjv: And he took and sent messes unto them from before him: but Benjamin’s mess was five times so much as any of theirs. And they drank, and were merry with him.
